items.title: British pound stablecoins capped to $53B ceiling as Bank of England sets out stablecoin rules
items.snippet: The Bank of England has removed the biggest usability objection from its sterling stablecoin plan, but it has kept a ceiling on how large any single systemic pound token can become.
